weekly.label: Weekly focus
weekly.title: Runtime settings as cognitive-machine UX
weekly.summary: The newest surface makes intrusive runtime chrome configurable: quiet map, collapsed console, and viewport activation as an explicit opt-in.
weekly.why: Good media infrastructure should be inspectable without forcing inspection on every visitor.
